name: Majespecter Cat - Nekomata
name_jp: マジェスペクター・キャット
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
undefined

[ Monster Effect ] 
When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Majespecter" card from your Deck to your hand during the End Phase of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Majespecter Cat - Nekomata" once per turn. Cannot be targeted or destroyed by your opponent's card effects.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Majespecter" card from your Deck to your hand during the End Phase of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Majespecter Cat - Nekomata" once per turn. Cannot be targeted or destroyed by your opponent's card effects.
eff: When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Majespecter" card from your Deck to your hand during the End Phase of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Majespecter Cat - Nekomata" once per turn. Cannot be targeted or destroyed by your opponent's card effects.
